ast.source: Buy Me A Coffee
ast.target: 请我喝杯咖啡

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Got a suggestion or found a bug? You can open an issue on
ast.target: 有建议或发现了错误？你可以在这里提交 issue：

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If you really like this plugin and want to support its development, please consider buying me a coffee 🙂 Thanks!
ast.target: 如果你真的喜欢这个插件并想支持它的开发，请考虑请我喝杯咖啡 🙂 谢谢！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many daily notes in the future to open when running the command.
ast.target: 运行该命令时要打开多少未来的每日笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many daily notes in the past to open when running the command.
ast.target: 运行命令时打开多少天之前的每日笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, daily notes will be created as they're opened if they don't exist.
ast.target: 如果启用，在打开每日笔记时若不存在将自动创建。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open notes in…
ast.target: 在…中打开笔记

ast.target: 打开前几天

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Days behind to open
ast.target: 打开后几天

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Create notes when opening

ast.source: Opening notes in windows is unsupported on mobile.
